revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) In cherry_pick_moments[0].alternative_hypothesis, correct the attribution of the dog tangent — it was Tanya-initiated, not Brandon's choice; revise the dismissal of the strategic hypothesis to use the correct evidence (no payoff from staying on task, bill still not sent after the tangent). (2) In cherry_pick_moments[1].codex_reference, change from coaching_philosophy.empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure to analysis_directives.scam_anxiety_signal — the prior-solar-no-show is a trust/competitive signal, not a personal vulnerability disclosure. (3) In handoff_brief.unresolved_concerns[2], downgrade 'has not been differentiating Ion from the door-knocker' from an unresolved customer concern to a coaching gap flag (Brandon didn't reinforce differentiation) — the transcript does not show Tanya conflating Ion with the door-knocker. (4) Add at minimum two of the four missed moments to cherry_pick_moments: (a) the down-payment question at 14:46 (high-leverage fixed-income moment under-utilized, V1-tracked as partial but not Stage-3 surfaced) and (b) the title/co-decision-maker probe gap at 03:00 (protocols.adult_child_decision_maker not invoked despite vulnerability signals). Tone corrections in coaching_focus[0].why and handoff_brief.closer_should_know should be softened to behavioral/transcript-grounded language — remove characterization of Brandon's capabilities and the speculative prediction about Tanya recalling 'most of the time.'
